title: Code of Conduct and Workplace Behavior Expectations
text:
Q: What are the expectations for my behavior and conduct at work?
A: At our company, we expect all employees to adhere to a high standard of conduct and professionalism. This includes treating colleagues, clients, and stakeholders with respect, integrity, and fairness. Harassment, discrimination, and any form of bullying will not be tolerated. Employees are also expected to maintain a positive work environment by being punctual, meeting deadlines, and communicating effectively. If you witness or experience any behavior that violates our code of conduct, please report it to your supervisor or the HR department within 24 hours. We encourage open communication and will investigate all reports confidentially and promptly. For further details, refer to the Employee Handbook or contact HR at hr@company.com.
